author: seethroughdev
description: Quickly grab the important contents of any online recipe.
name: Recipe Grabber

releases.author: seethroughdev
releases.description:
This release cleans up some code and improves decoding html entities. 

It addresses:

- #34 - HTML Entities
- #32 - Issues with Debug mode
releases.name: Release v0.21.0

releases.author: seethroughdev
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: append to file if its open in reading mode by @Ovyerus in https://github.com/seethroughdev/obsidian-recipe-grabber/pull/30

## New Contributors
* @Ovyerus made their first contribution in https://github.com/seethroughdev/obsidian-recipe-grabber/pull/30

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/seethroughdev/obsidian-recipe-grabber/compare/0.19.0...0.20.0
releases.name: Release v0.20.0

releases.author: seethroughdev
releases.description:
This release improves several pieces of the plugin. Including:

- Image saving locally
- Much improved templates
- Improved CI and codebase


Thanks to @Lanjelin and @Flxp49 .
releases.name: Release v.0.19.0

releases.author: seethroughdev
releases.description:
This release addresses several issues and adds improved usability for saving documents.

- https://github.com/seethroughdev/obsidian-recipe-grabber/pull/18 - improve save usability
- https://github.com/seethroughdev/obsidian-recipe-grabber/issues/19 - add support for single string lists
- https://github.com/seethroughdev/obsidian-recipe-grabber/issues/15 - add unescape option for edit mode

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added more triple handlebars for better rendering of default template.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Addresses the following issues:

- #4 Now creates a file in the active directory if none is open when using the plugin
- #12 You can now use a {{json}} key in your template to render the json
- #11 Fixed instructions to render nested arrays with sections as well
- #9 Wrapped some of the default keys in triple `{{{}}}` to allow rendering of html

releases.author: seethroughdev
releases.description:
This release makes Recipe Grabber's inserted meta tags compatible with the latest version of Obsidian that requires no whitespace before the FrontMatter info.

https://obsidian.md/changelog/2023-08-31-desktop-v1.4.6/

Addressed in #6 , special thanks to @niposch for catching it, and the quick fix.

releases.author: seethroughdev
releases.description: This is the initial pre-release of recipe-grabber!
